calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-09-2005 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID BLUMENFELD FOR PLAINTIFF BILL NG
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY FRANK RIEBLI FOR DEFENDANT MANYA LANDERS

SETTLMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TO VACATE 1737 JONES STREET BY 5PM 1-1-06. ALL ASSIGNEES AND SUBLETTERS TO VACATE BY 5PM 1-1-06. TENANT AND LANDLORD TO SHARE PG&E BILLS. IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH TERMS, PLAINTIFF TO WAIVE RENT TO 1-1-06 AND BACKRENT AND PAY DEFENDANT $7000.
$35OO PAID BY 11-11-05 AND THE BALANCE WHEN DEFENDANT VACATES. PLAINTIFF WILL FILE DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE WITHIN 15 DAYS OF VACATING. IF DEFENDANT BREACHES AGREEMENT, UPON DECLARATION, PLAINTIFF TO FILE JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION, MONEY DAMAGES, BACK RENT, REASONABLE COSTS AND DAMAGES. FURTHER STAYS WAIVED. IN CONSIDERATION DEFENDANT RELEASES PLAINTIFF OF ALL CLAIMS AS A RESULT OF OCCUPANCY. PLAINTIFF RELEASES DEFENDANT OF ANY AND ALL CLAIMS. DOES NOT INCLUDE DAMAGES TO PREMISES OR UNPAID UTILITY BILLS. PARTIES AGREE TO WAIVER PER 1542cc. ANY PROPERTY LEFT BEHIND MAY BE DISPOSED OF. WRITTEN AGREEMENT CONTROLS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:IRVING PFEFFER ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER:SUSAN LEE (218)
